name: Early Marriage: Venus Exalted + 7th Lord in Benefic House
description: Classical indicator of extremely early marriage or strong disposition for early partnership when Venus is exalted/own sign and 7th lord is well-placed.

source_text.quote: If the 7th lord is in a benefic's house (or in the 9th as subha Rasi so means) while Venus is exalted or is in own sign, the native will marry at the age of 5 or 9.

all_of: 7th lord is positioned in a benefic house (1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11) or the 9th house
Venus is either exalted (Pisces) or in own sign (Taurus/Libra)

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of early marriage readiness. Classical ages 5 or 9 should be interpreted as strong disposition for early partnership in modern contexts (18-22 range). Indicates the chart has strong marriage promise without obstruction.

metadata.notes: Classical age-based rules should not be applied literally in modern contexts. Interpret as: marriage will happen at the first available dasha window after social marriageable age.

name: Early Marriage: Venus in 2nd + 7th Lord in 11th
description: The connection between Venus (Karaka) in the house of family (2nd) and the 7th lord in the house of gains (11th) precipitates an early union.

source_text.quote: Venus in the 2nd while the 7th lord is in the 11th will give marriage at the age of 10 or 16.

all_of: Venus is positioned in the 2nd house
The 7th lord is positioned in the 11th house

interpretation.meaning: Symbolic indicator of early marriage. Venus in the family house + 7th lord in the gains house = marriage comes easily and early without obstruction.

metadata.notes: Ages 10 or 16 indicate early marriage timing in ancient contexts. Modern interpretation: marriage in the first available planetary period after age 18-21.

name: Early Marriage: Parivartana (Exchange) of 2nd and 11th Lords
description: A mutual exchange between the lords of family (2nd) and gains/desires (11th) accelerates family formation.

source_text.quote: An exchange between the lords of the 2nd and the 11th will bring marriage 13 years after birth.

all_of: The 2nd lord is in the 11th house
The 11th lord is in the 2nd house

interpretation.meaning: Parivartana Yoga (mutual exchange) between the houses of family/wealth (2nd) and gains/desires (11th) accelerates family formation. Does not explicitly involve the 7th house, showing the importance of the 2nd/11th axis.

metadata.notes: Age 13 points to early relationship developments. Modern interpretation: strong facilitation of marriage in first available period. Check dasha of either exchanging lord.

name: Normal Marriage Timing: 7th Lord in 12th + Lagna Lord in D9 7th
description: Standard marriage timing (age 23-26) when 7th lord is weakened by 12th house placement but compensated by Lagna lord activating the D9 7th house.

source_text.quote: Should the 7th lord be in the 12th while the natal ascendant lord is in the 7th in Navamsa, marriage will be in 23rd/26th year of age.

all_of: The natal 7th lord is positioned in the 12th house in the D1 chart
The natal Ascendant (Lagna) lord is positioned in the 7th house of the Navamsa (D9) chart

interpretation.meaning: Standard marriage timing. The 7th lord in the 12th creates mild delay (loss/expense related to partnership), but Lagna lord in D9 7th house ensures marriage will happen in the normal age range (23-26).

metadata.notes: Ages 23/26 typically indicate normal marriage timing in classical texts. Integrates both D1 and D9 placements. Modern interpretation: marriage in mid-20s.

name: Delayed Marriage: 8th Lord in 7th + Venus in D9 Lagna
description: The placement of the obstacle-causing 8th lord in the marriage house creates significant delays, pushing marriage into later years (25-33).

source_text.quote: Either the 25th year or the 33rd year will bring marriage if the 8th lord is in the 7th as Venus is in Navamsa ascendant.

all_of: The 8th lord is positioned in the 7th house in the natal D1 chart
Venus is positioned in the 1st house (Ascendant) of the Navamsa (D9) chart

interpretation.meaning: The 8th lord in the 7th house creates obstruction, transformation, and delay in marriage. But Venus in D9 Lagna ensures marriage WILL happen - just later (age 25-33). The delay is structural, not denial.

metadata.notes: Ages 25 and 33 were considered significantly delayed in the classical era. Modern interpretation: marriage delayed to late 20s/early 30s.

name: Delayed Marriage: Venus in 5th + Rahu in 5th/9th
description: The combination of Venus (marriage significator) in the house of romance (5th) heavily influenced by Rahu delays traditional formalization to age 31-33.

source_text.quote: Should Venus be in the 9th from the 9th (i.e. in the 5th house), while Rahu is in one of the said houses (i.e. in the 5th/9th), marriage will take place during 31st or 33rd year.

all_of: Venus is positioned in the 5th house
any_of: Rahu is positioned in the 5th house
Rahu is positioned in the 9th house

interpretation.meaning: Venus in 5th = romantic nature. Rahu in 5th/9th = unconventional approach to love and dharma. Combination delays traditional marriage but does not deny it. Often associated with non-traditional relationship paths before marriage.

metadata.notes: Ages 31 and 33 act as markers for late marriage. Often points to non-traditional relationship paths (love affairs, live-in, delayed commitment) before marriage occurs.
